name: Slice & Bake Sugar Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut four 14" x 12-inch pieces of waxed paper or plastic wrap; set aside.
2. In a large bowl, cream butter or margarine and sugar until smooth.
3. Beat in eggs, vanilla, and lemon extract until light and fluffy.
4. In a separate bowl, combine dry ingredients: flour and baking soda.
5. Gradually stir the flour mixture into the egg mixture until fully blended.
6. Divide the dough into four pieces. Shape each piece into an 8 to 10-inch roll.
7. Wrap each roll in waxed paper or plastic wrap.
8. Place the wrapped rolls in a freezer container with a tight-fitting lid, or wrap them airtight in foil.
9. Label and date the container. Store in the freezer for up to 6 months.
To make cookies:
1. Slightly thaw the dough at room temperature.
2. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
3. Lightly grease two large baking sheets.
4. Cut the dough into slices or chunks, and sprinkle with sugar if desired.
5. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes until the edges start to brown.
6. Remove cookies from the baking sheets and cool on wire racks.
7. Alternatively, roll out the dough and cut with cookie cutters before baking as described in steps 3-6.
